name: Pumpkin Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a 15-inch x 10-inch x 1-inch jellyroll pan; set aside.
2. Beat eggs in a large bowl at high speed with an electric mixer until thick. Gradually add sugar, and beat for an additional 5 minutes. Stir in pumpkin and lemon juice.
3. Combine flour and the next five ingredients; gradually stir into pumpkin mixture. Spread batter evenly in prepared pan. Sprinkle with 1 cup pecans, gently pressing into batter.
4. Bake at 375 degrees F for 12 to 15 minutes.
5. Sift 1 to 2 Tablespoons powdered sugar over a 15-inch x 10-inch rectangle on a cloth towel. When cake is done, loosen from sides of pan and turn cake out onto the sugared towel. Starting at the narrow end, roll up cake and towel together. Let cool on a wire rack, seam side down.
6. Beat cream cheese and butter in a large bowl at high speed with an electric mixer. Gradually add 1 cup powdered sugar and vanilla, beating until blended.
7. Unroll cake; spread with cream cheese mixture. Carefully reroll. Place on plate, seam side down. Garnish with whipped cream or pecans if desired. Yield: 10 servings
